response.step_by_step_log:
I identified two distinct songs.
1. 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' (01:03-03:14) by Azari. Lyrics found using search string: `"Whisper Whisper Whisper" Azari Japanese and English lyrics`.
2. 'BANG!!!' (03:14-04:55) by Giga and ryo (supercell). Lyrics found using search string: `"BANG!!!" Giga Japanese and English lyrics`.
Scenes were defined based on song changes.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by VTubers. The medley consists of 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' by Azari and 'BANG!!!' by Giga/ryo (supercell).

scenes.description: The song 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' begins, with title and artist credits displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
忘れられないのは この目のせい
赤く残る過ち 甘噛みの跡
溢れだす愛は 止めどもない
誰もいない間に 悪魔を探す
作り笑いは この耳のせい
深い壁の中から 呼びかける声
Whisper, whisper, whisper
まだ触らせない
この檻を抜け出して
悪魔は駆ける
鏡の前で
この口のせい
伝えたい言葉さえ噛み殺す夜
Whisper, whisper, whisper
まだ打ち明けない
神様を裏切って悪魔と過ごす
曖昧に夢見ていたい
そっと気づかせてあげたいだけ
Whisper, whisper, whisper...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's these eyes' fault that I can't forget
About the red stains of my errors
The remains of a gentle bite
The overflowing love is endless
Searching for the devil while no one is around
It's these ears' fault for the fake smile
The voice calling out from inside deep walls
Whisper, whisper, whisper
It still won't let me touch
I'll escape from this cage
And the devil will run
In front of the mirror
Because of this mouth
The night of death where I suppress even the words I want to say
Whisper, whisper, whisper
It hasn't made it clear yet
Betraying God and living with demons
I want to dream vaguely
And I just want you to notice
Whisper, whisper, whisper...

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like it, hate it, common sense, I don't care - blow it up with a BANG!!!
Bring it on, majority
There's no such thing as losing for me
"That's enough" - that boundary that was drawn, whose rule is it?
The weak heart I overcame that day
The stronger me that I've become will just laugh it away, HAHA
I'll say what I want to say
I won't do what I don't want to do
I won't do things I don't want to do, right?
Different from everyone, and completely out of the ordinary
I won't change either, I'm the one who decides my own way!
I want to be free
I don't say sweet things to my own desires
If I do that, I can't change anything
I won't change!
I'm the one who decides!
I'm the one who's living!
